data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of supporting subject entities beyond built-in domain tables. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or validations that confirm this requirement is met. Specifically, the linked use case and prior step evidence do not reference any mechanisms or endpoints that would validate the support for subject entities, indicating a clear gap in the implementation.
gaps: Lack of evidence for support of subject entities beyond built-in domain tables.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify support for subject entities.
